notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Trevor Larnach grounds into a force out, first baseman Christian Walker to shortstop Nick Allen. Tristan Gray out at 2nd. Trevor Larnach advances to 2nd, on a throwing error by shortstop Nick Allen.

notableEvents.label: Isaac Paredes GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Isaac Paredes grounds into a double play, shortstop Tristan Gray to second baseman Kody Clemens to first baseman Royce Lewis. Yordan Alvarez out at 2nd. Isaac Paredes out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Isaac Paredes rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Isaac Paredes grounds into a double play, shortstop Tristan Gray to second baseman Kody Clemens to first baseman Royce Lewis. Yordan Alvarez out at 2nd. Isaac Paredes out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Christian Vázquez GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Christian Vázquez grounds into an unassisted double play, first baseman Royce Lewis. Nick Allen out at 2nd. Christian Vázquez out at 1st.
